message:
results: integration smoke test with GPT-5.2 across all four strategies

All strategies complete a multi-step Python task. No compaction or
recall triggered (task too short). Validates harness end-to-end with
real API calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# Integration Smoke Test Results
+
+**Date:** 2026-02-13
+**Model:** GPT-5.2 (OpenAI)
+**Task:** Multi-step Python task (add 3 functions + write tests + run tests)
+
+## Results
+
+| Strategy | Turns | Total Tokens | Fork Calls | Retention Score | Duration |
+|----------|-------|-------------|------------|-----------------|----------|
+| compact | 14 | 134,952 | 0 | 0.87 | 30s |
+| recall | 13 | 125,806 | 0 | 0.80 | 34s |
+| session-log | 16 | 164,952 | 16 | 0.73 | 70s |
+| ooda | 16 | 198,198 | 16 | 0.60 | 64s |
+
+## Notes
+
+- All strategies completed the task successfully
+- No compaction events or recall calls — task was too short to trigger context pressure
+- session-log and ooda strategies show overhead from forked summarization (expected)
+- ooda uses the most tokens due to Orient-phase session log injection each turn
+- These strategies are designed for long sessions (100+ turns); proper evaluation requires SWE-bench Pro or similar long-horizon tasks
+- Retention score differences are likely noise on such a short task

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "strategy": "compact",
+  "model": "gpt-5.2",
+  "task": "Do ALL of the following in main.py:\n1. Add an is_prime(n) function that returns True if n is prime, False otherwise. Handle edge cases (n\u003c2 returns False).\n2. Add a prime_factors(n) function that returns the list of prime factors of n.\n3. Add a collatz_steps(n) function that returns the number of steps in the Collatz sequence starting from n until reaching 1.\n4. Write a test_math.py file with tests for ALL functions (existing and new): fibonacci, factorial, gcd, lcm, is_prime, prime_factors, collatz_steps. Use unittest.\n5. Run the tests and fix any issues.",
+  "completed": true,
+  "turn_count": 14,
+  "total_input_tokens": 133501,
+  "total_output_tokens": 1451,
+  "total_tokens": 134952,

Tests pass:\\n\\n- Command: python3 -m unittest -q\\n- Result: Ran 15 tests — OK\",\"data\":{},\"artifacts\":[\"main.py\",\"test_math.py\"]}"
+}
